unresolved: Scope of 'the deserialize method': I treated the changing signature as the abstract 2-arg JsonDeserializer.deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext). JsonDeserializer also declares a 3-arg merge overload deserialize(p, ctxt, intoValue). If THAT overload's signature is also changing, additional override sites (e.g. CollectionDeserializer/MapDeserializer/ReferenceTypeDeserializer/UntypedObjectDeserializer/SettableBeanProperty 3-arg deserialize, BeanAsArrayBuilderDeserializer, etc.) and their call sites would need to be added. Those 3-arg-only sites are intentionally EXCLUDED here.

Anonymous-class override sites in tests (TestCustomEnumKeyDeserializer @218/@246, CollectionDeserTest @360, BeanDeserializerTest @244/@257/@272/@287) have no class name; they are denoted by file + source line (anon@<line>) rather than a symbol name.

Property-class methods with the identical 2-arg signature (SettableBeanProperty.deserialize, SettableAnyProperty.deserialize and its JsonNode* subtypes) are NOT overrides of JsonDeserializer; they are included only as call sites (their bodies invoke a delegate JsonDeserializer.deserialize). Their own signatures need not change, but their bodies must — so they remain in the set.
